expectations.text: Detects and reads the existing PROGRESS.md file
expectations.evidence: The response.md shows a 'Status Review' section that accurately lists all phases and their completion dates from the original PROGRESS.md, and notes 'Phase 4 (Strategy): NOT completed -- session was interrupted here.'

expectations.text: Correctly identifies Phase 4 (Strategy) as the next incomplete phase
expectations.evidence: The response explicitly states 'Phase 4 (Strategy): NOT completed -- session was interrupted here' and proceeds to generate strategy content under 'Resuming: Phase 4 -- Strategy'.

expectations.text: Generates strategy documents (lean-canvas.md, value-proposition.md, business-model.md, positioning.md, go-to-market.md)
expectations.evidence: No separate strategy files were generated. All strategy content was written into a single response.md file. The required individual files (lean-canvas.md, value-proposition.md, business-model.md, positioning.md, go-to-market.md) do not exist.

expectations.text: Strategy content is coherent with the existing parking finder brief (IoT sensors, SF/LA market, freemium model)
expectations.evidence: The strategy content in response.md references IoT sensors and camera feeds, SF and LA markets, freemium model at $9.99/month, B2B revenue share (10-15%), founder's Waymo background, and $50k savings — all consistent with the intake brief.

expectations.text: Updates PROGRESS.md to mark Phase 4 as completed
expectations.evidence: No updated PROGRESS.md file exists in the without_skill outputs directory. Only response.md was produced.
